quizzes.q: Which guardian proves you are who you claim, before access?
quizzes.why: Identification and Authentication proves identity before access is granted.

quizzes.q: Where do the Low, Moderate, and High control baselines live?
quizzes.why: The baselines live in companion volume 800-53B.

quizzes.q: Ransomware hits and encrypts everything. What brings you back?
quizzes.why: CP-9, System Backup, is what brings you back after encryption.

quizzes.q: Which document tells you HOW to assess whether controls work?
quizzes.why: SP 800-53A is the assessment companion — it tells you HOW to test controls.

quizzes.q: A senior official accepts the risk and lets the system operate. Which control?
quizzes.why: CA-6, Authorization, is the official's formal acceptance of risk.
